mapper.select: SELECT gp.project_no , gp.group_no , gp.pm , p.project_code FROM g_project gp JOIN project p ON gp.project_no = p.project_no WHERE gp.pm = 1 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM members m WHERE m.group_no = gp.group_no AND m.user_id = #{userId} )
SELECT DISTINCT u.username FROM users u JOIN project p ON p.user_id = u.user_id ORDER BY u.username

SELECT p.le, p.project_no, p.parent_project_no, p.project_name, p.project_desc, p.project_code, p.project_home, p.status, p.public_yn, p.start_date, p.end_date, FN_GET_CODE_NAME(p.status) AS project_status, j.title AS latest_job_title FROM vw_project p LEFT JOIN ( SELECT project_no, title FROM (SELECT project_no, title, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY project_no ORDER BY add_date DESC) as rn FROM job) WHERE rn = 1 ) j ON j.project_no = p.project_no
AND p.status BETWEEN 330 AND 370 AND (EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM vw_member WHERE project_no = p.project_no AND user_id = #{userId}) OR p.public_yn = 1)

SELECT project_no, job_no, title, progress, start_date, end_date, job_status_no FROM job WHERE project_no IN
#{id}

SELECT project_no, user_id FROM vw_member WHERE project_no IN
#{id}
SELECT project_no , project_name FROM vw_project WHERE status != 390 ORDER BY project_no
mapper.insert:
SELECT PROJECT_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO project ( project_no, -- 식별자 parent_project_no, -- 상위프로젝트 project_name, -- 프로젝트명 user_id, -- 제작자 project_desc, -- 설명 project_home, -- 홈페이지 project_code, -- URI create_at, -- 생성일 update_at, -- 수정일 start_date, -- 시작일 end_date, -- 종료일 public_yn, -- 공개여부 status -- 상태 ) SELECT #{projectNo} -- selectKey에서 세팅된 시퀀스 값 사용 , NVL(#{parentProjectNo}, 0) -- null able, default: 0 , #{projectName} -- 필수값: 중복 가능 , #{userId} -- 필수값: Service 에서 세팅 , NVL(#{projectDesc}, '') -- null able, 추후에 null 예외처리 가능성 , NVL(#{projectHome}, '') -- null able, 추후에 null 예외처리 가능성 , #{projectCode} -- 필수값(Unique, 수정불가능) , SYSTIMESTAMP -- 생성일 자동 , NULL -- 수정일은 생성 시 null , #{startDate} -- 필수값(오늘 이전 날짜 불가) , #{endDate} -- 필수값(오늘 이전 날짜 불가) , NVL(#{publicYn}, 0) -- null able, default: 0 , #{status} -- 필수값: Service 에서 세팅 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM project WHERE project_code = #{projectCode} )
INSERT INTO g_project (project_no, group_no, pm) SELECT #{newProjectNo}, group_no, pm FROM g_project WHERE project_no = #{parentProjectNo}
mapper.select: SELECT start_date , end_date FROM project WHERE project_no = #{parentProjectNo}
SELECT project_no, project_name , start_date , end_date FROM project WHERE project_code=#{projectCode}
SELECT job_status FROM job_status ORDER BY job_status_no

select * from ( SELECT job_type , js.job_status FROM job j JOIN job_status js ON js.job_status_no = j.job_status_no RIGHT OUTER JOIN job_type jt ON j.job_type_no = jt.job_type_no AND j.project_no in (SELECT project_no FROM project START WITH project_code = #{projectCode} CONNECT BY NOCYCLE parent_project_no = PRIOR project_no) ) PIVOT ( count(job_status) FOR job_status IN(${pivotInSQL}) ) ORDER BY job_type

SELECT gs.groupname , u.username FROM project p JOIN g_project gp ON p.project_no = gp.project_no JOIN members m ON gp.group_no = m.group_no JOIN users u ON m.user_id = u.user_id JOIN groups gs ON m.group_no = gs.group_no WHERE p.project_code = #{projectCode} ORDER BY gs.groupname, u.username

SELECT n.notice_no , n.title , n.content , n.add_date , n.privacy_settings , u.username FROM( SELECT notice_no , title , content , add_date , privacy_settings , user_id FROM notice ORDER BY add_date DESC ) n JOIN users u ON n.user_id = u.user_id WHERE ROWNUM <= 2

SELECT child.project_name , child.project_code , child.status , FN_GET_CODE_NAME(child.status) AS status_name FROM project parent JOIN project child ON parent.project_no = child.parent_project_no WHERE parent.project_code = #{projectCode} AND child.status Between #{active} AND #{locked}

WITH project_tree AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALIZE */ p.project_no, p.project_name, p.start_date, p.end_date, p.project_code, p.parent_project_no, p.project_desc FROM project p START WITH p.project_code = #{projectCode} CONNECT BY NOCYCLE PRIOR p.project_no = p.parent_project_no ) SELECT id, text, rawStartDate, rawEndDate, progress, parent, project_id , u.username AS "worker_name" , c.common_name AS "job_priority" , description , job_status_no, job_type_no, public_role, files_no, worker_id, manager_id FROM ( SELECT 'p' || pt.project_no AS id , pt.project_name AS text , pt.start_date AS rawStartDate , pt.end_date AS rawEndDate , 0 AS progress , CASE WHEN NVL(pt.parent_project_no, 0) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE 'p' || pt.parent_project_no END AS parent , NULL AS project_id , NULL AS worker_id , NULL AS manager_id , NULL AS job_priority , pt.project_desc AS description , NULL AS job_status_no , NULL AS job_type_no , NULL AS public_role , NULL AS files_no FROM project_tree pt
UNION ALL
SELECT 'j' || j.job_no AS id , j.title AS text , j.start_date AS rawStartDate , j.end_date AS rawEndDate , j.progress / 100.0 AS progress , CASE WHEN j.parent_job_no IS NULL THEN 'p' || j.project_no ELSE 'j' || j.parent_job_no END AS parent , 'p' || j.project_no AS project_id , j.user_id AS worker_id , j.manager_id , j.priority AS job_priority , j.content AS description , j.job_status_no , j.job_type_no , j.public_role , j.files_no FROM job j JOIN project_tree pt ON pt.project_no = j.project_no ) LEFT JOIN users u ON u.user_id = worker_id LEFT JOIN common c ON c.common_no = job_priority ORDER BY parent DESC, id
SELECT holiday_dt, is_holiday, holiday_name FROM holiday ORDER BY holiday_dt

SELECT h.history_no , h.change_comment AS "desc" , h.history_date , h.delete_date , h.job_no , h.user_id , u.username , j.title , j.user_id AS worker_id , j.manager_id , j.public_role , jt.job_type , j.job_type_no , js.job_status , j.job_status_no FROM history h JOIN job j ON h.job_no = j.job_no JOIN ( SELECT project_no FROM project START WITH project_code = #{projectCode} CONNECT BY PRIOR project_no = parent_project_no ) p ON j.project_no = p.project_no JOIN users u ON u.user_id = h.user_id JOIN job_type jt ON jt.job_type_no = j.job_type_no JOIN job_status js ON js.job_status_no = j.job_status_no WHERE h.history_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ORDER BY h.history_date DESC

SELECT COUNT(h.history_no) FROM history h JOIN job j ON h.job_no = j.job_no JOIN ( SELECT project_no FROM project START WITH project_code = #{projectCode} CONNECT BY PRIOR project_no = parent_project_no ) p ON j.project_no = p.project_no WHERE h.history_date < TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
